phase_statuses.title: Decompose backend document manager orchestration
phase_statuses.objective: Split preview/download/delete support responsibilities out of the current backend manager while keeping `DocumentManager` as the stable facade used by unified routes.

acceptance_criteria.text: `DocumentManager` no longer directly owns all preview payload building, watermark package construction, unified download response construction, and delete orchestration in one file.
existing unified documents router behavior, response envelopes, and controlled download semantics remain unchanged.
document delete/download flows still fail fast on missing prerequisites, invalid source input, and out-of-scope document access.

phase_statuses.title: Decompose frontend document-audit page and hook
phase_statuses.objective: Split the document-audit page shell and hook into smaller units for data loading, filter state, tab rendering, and versions-modal rendering without changing current behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: `useDocumentAuditPage.js` no longer directly owns all data loading, user-name resolution, audit filtering, and versions-dialog orchestration in one file.
`DocumentAudit.js` no longer mixes page shell, tab switcher, filter controls, table renderers, signature-manifest rendering, and versions-modal markup in one file.
current page interactions, test ids, version-history loading, and document/deletion/download tab behavior remain stable after extraction.

phase_statuses.title: Focused regression validation and task evidence
phase_statuses.objective: Prove the bounded documents/document-audit refactor preserved both backend and frontend behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: focused backend and frontend documents/document-audit tests pass against the final code state.
task artifacts record the exact commands run, verified acceptance coverage, and bounded residual risk.

goal: 继续进行前后端重构：以下一 tranche 聚焦 documents/document audit 模块，拆分后端 DocumentManager 与前端 DocumentAudit 页面和 hook，保持统一文档下载/删除/批量下载与审计页面行为稳定并补齐验证。
